title: Wrong PropertyPath behaviour on fresh instance
key_bug_features: Incorrect results from subClassOf property path on fresh instance
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_classes (id VARCHAR(255) PRIMARY KEY, type VARCHAR(255), isDefinedBy VARCHAR(255), subClassOf VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_classes (id, type, isDefinedBy, subClassOf) VALUES ('http://test1.com/test1', 'Class', 'http://abc.io/test/ontology/12345', NULL);
INSERT INTO test_classes (id, type, isDefinedBy, subClassOf) VALUES ('http://test1.com/test2', 'Class', 'http://abc.io/test/ontology/12345', 'http://test1.com/test1');
DELETE FROM test_classes WHERE subClassOf IS NOT NULL AND subClassOf = 'http://test1.com/test1';
SELECT * FROM test_classes WHERE type = 'Class' AND (isDefinedBy IS NOT NULL OR subClassOf IS NULL);
